column10:
Treasure cards are referred to as items while in play. Place items you control in front of you. When instructed to gain treasure, take that many cards from the top of the treasure deck and put them into play under your control.

Silver-bordered passive items can have static abilities and triggered abilities.

Gold-bordered active items have at least 1 activated ability. These are abilities that you can activate any time you have priority and can pay their costs.
